name: TablePlus
description: Modern, native database GUI client supporting MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, SQL Server, Redis, and more

version_check.url: Likely Sparkle appcast at https://tableplus.com/release/macos/{version} — exact feed URL not publicly documented. Common pattern: https://tableplus.com/api/release/macos/latest

extraction.pattern: sparkle:shortVersionString (inferred, exact appcast URL not confirmed)

release_date.field: Scrape date from changelog page or pubDate from appcast (if reachable)

notes: Paid application with free trial. Sparkle appcast URL is not publicly documented — likely at https://tableplus.com/release/macos/{version} or similar pattern. Also available on Mac App Store and Setapp. Universal binary.
